Bash(npx --no-install playwright-cli -s=tc008 run-code "async page => { const radios = await page.locator\('input[type=radio]'\).count\(\); const radioInfo = []; for\(let i=0;i<radios;i++\){ const r=page.locator\('input[type=radio]'\).nth\(i\); radioInfo.push\(\(await r.getAttribute\('name'\)\)+' / checked='+\(await r.isChecked\(\)\)\); } const labels = await page.getByRole\('radio'\).evaluateAll\(els=>els.map\(e=>e.getAttribute\('aria-label'\)||e.closest\('label'\)?.innerText||''\)\); return 'radioCount='+radios+'\\n'+radioInfo.join\('\\n'\)+'\\nLABELS: '+JSON.stringify\(labels\); }")

Bash(npx --no-install playwright-cli --raw eval '\(function\(\){function cls\(sel\){var e=document.querySelector\(sel\);return e?e.className:null;} *)

Bash(npx --no-install playwright-cli --raw eval "\(function\(\){var labels=[...document.querySelectorAll\('*'\)].filter\(function\(e\){return e.children.length===0&&/\(Project|Release|Cycle|Suite|Tester|Precondition|Assigned To|Business User|Status\)\\s*:?$/i.test\(e.innerText.trim\(\)\)&&e.innerText.trim\(\).length<30}\);return JSON.stringify\([...new Set\(labels.map\(function\(e\){return e.innerText.trim\(\)}\)\)]\)}\)\(\)")
Bash(npx --no-install playwright-cli run-code "async page => { await page.locator\('input[placeholder=\\"Select status...\\"]'\).first\(\).click\(\); }")

Bash(npx --no-install playwright-cli run-code "async page => { const cell = page.locator\('.testlistrow:not\(.header\)'\).first\(\).locator\('> div:nth-child\(5\)'\); await cell.locator\('button.assign-icon-button'\).click\(\); await cell.locator\('input.assign-search-input'\).click\(\); }")
Bash(npx --no-install playwright-cli run-code "async page => { await page.waitForTimeout\(4000\); }")

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 9323 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { $procId = $_; try { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Stopped PID $procId" } catch { "Could not stop PID $procId" } } } else { "No process listening on port 9323" })
